name: skraper
description: Kotlin/Java library and cli tool for scraping posts and media from various sources with neither authorization nor full page rendering (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Youtube, Tiktok, Telegram, Twitch, Reddit, 9GAG, Pinterest, Flickr, Tumblr, Coub, Vimeo, IFunny, VK, Odnoklassniki, Pikabu)
